facebook.caption: If you are going to splurge anywhere in Phu Quoc, make it the JW Marriott Emerald Bay Resort and Spa at Bai Khem Beach. This stunning beachfront property earns its 4.7 out of 5 rating across over 3,000 reviews, and it is easy to see why. Think three outdoor pools, five restaurants covering a range of cuisines, and a spa that will genuinely make you forget the outside world exists. The architecture alone is worth the visit, designed to feel like a reimagined colonial university with a playful, artistic twist. Practical tip: Bai Khem is on the southern tip of the island, so plan your transport in advance since it sits a little away from the main town. Best experienced in the dry season between November and April for calm seas and sunny skies.

instagram.caption: Three pools, five restaurants, one gorgeous beach, and a spa that does not disappoint. The JW Marriott Emerald Bay in Phu Quoc is the kind of resort that makes you extend your trip. Rated 4.7 out of 5 from over 3,000 guests, it delivers on the hype. Visit November through April for the best weather.

tiktok.caption: This Phu Quoc resort is STUNNING. 3 pools, 5 restaurants, beachfront bliss. Worth every penny. #PhuQuocResort #JWMarriott #LuxuryTravel #VietnamTravel

scenes: Best Nov to Apr for sunny skies
